text: english class at the airport  good morning good morning sir i would like to check in sure may i see your passport and ticket
sir sure here you are i have seen your information you are flying to canada today yeah this is my first flight i have never flown before really you
will enjoy this journey with us how many bags do you have for checking i have just one bag could you please put your bag on the
conveyor belt that would be great yeah sure  your bag weigh is 25 kilograms that is fine how many bags are you carrying on with you just one
there is my laptop in it it is fine you can take it on the plane with you really that is awesome would you like to take a window seat or nile seat
a window seat please i would like to see the outside view on the plane sure sir here is your boarding pass ticket and passport thank you
you will be boarding at gate 23 at 10 30. gate 23 at 10 30. got it where should i go next you will go through security check next
take the escalator and go upstairs where is the escalator go straight and turn right sir thanks you are welcome have a nice journey
sir you have keys in your pocket sorry i forgot to take them out fine walk through this scanner again
now you can take your items and ready to go hello hello please take out money and keys from your pockets money and keys yes and your laptop as well
don't worry you can take your items later okay got it put your items in this yellow bin now walk through this scanner
take your items and wait in the waiting hall you will be boarding in 10 minutes may i have your attention please mr paul ticket number 4759
please proceed to the gate number 23 this is my gate number 23. i should hurry up mr paul may i see your boarding pass here you go
walk through this tunnel it will take you directly to the plane  this is your captain speaking we are about to take off
please fasten your seat belt  hello sir what would you like to have what do you have we have noodles a chicken salad and sizzler rice
i will have noodles please and what about drink we have coffee tea and water and mango juice mango juice please here you go
good evening good evening sir may i see your passport and ticket please here you go could you please tell me your full name and age my name
is paul steve i'm 24 years old what do you do i am a student i study english what is the purpose of your visit here
i will be visiting my uncle he lives here in toronto how long will you be staying here about a month and where will you be staying i will be
staying with my uncle when will you be going back i will be going back after one month on monday fine do you have anything to declare
sorry about that i did not get you do you have any valuable thing no i don't fine here is your passport and ticket welcome to canada thanks
excuse me can you please tell me where can i get my baggage the baggage claims section is over there you can get your baggage there thanks
if you love this video please subscribe to our youtube channel and watch this next video i know you are going to love it
